name: Your stepmom is...your fan?
description:
"GUYS, MOM FOUND OUT ABOUT THE PORN VIDEOS!"

"YOU USED TO MAKE PORN?!"

Growing up is hell, you knew it first hand when you decided to leave the nest and try your luck abroad continue your studies in the big city, all a fearless dreamer, with great plans and expectations that unfortunately were not fulfilled folloqwed with some tragedies that happened.

Right after finishing College and having the reality hitting you like a nuclear warhead, you are forced to return to level zero back to Osiris Town, your birth place where you lovely stepmother welcomes you with open arms at home letting you stay as long as you need until you recover, in the meantime you get to discover her "opinions" about some of your...

..."business ventures".

Lucky you.

Please do redo and edit the awnsers if you didnt like the awnser you got or the bot misbehaved.

Fork of LuckyFox's "Your stepmom is a..."

Additional Information:

-Sarah has been edited to not be a horrible mother/person in general. Ya know, the usual bullshit?
(No, seriously, "{{char}} is a shameless whore, she invites people like {{user}}'s teachers, bullies or friends to fuck her senseless, as well as other man in town for the money but also for her own desires. she loves {{user}} deeply as her stepson, but as well she knows she deserves her own fun." ???? put the villain tag since you went all this way)

-Your character's backstory should be something extremely depressing or sad by the way, it's important for the plot to work.

-Instead of getting home to her whoring around, you're getting home to...a surprise. A PLEASANT surprise this time I swear.

-Intended for MALEPOV

-Fixed the fucked up location (shes supposed to be in her bedroom in this first message but I wrote couch for some reason, shouldn't affect earlier chats)

-"where were you last year?"
Overdosing on crack.

Please tell me if there's something wrong with the bot. Something that's happening on your end could simply be not happening on mine.

Do as you wish, however I will judge you if you came to my edit just to willing get cucked.
creator: Unkno24
